title: Butter Kits
description: An easy configurable kits plugin allowing good and versitile kits plugin for Virtual Kits rooms and Kit Claiming for Many Server Types
body:
# Kit Conversion Plugin

This is my first public plugin release by Buttershea, and hopefully the first of many more to come!

This plugin adds a fully customizable and easy-to-set-up Kit Room system to Minecraft, complete with in-game configuration tools for operators.

## Main Features

- Easy in-game setup
- Personalized player kits
- Preset kits made by operators
- Kit-specific ender chests
- GUI-based configuration
- Quick kit loading with commands

# Newly Added Kit Sharing 🔗

- New Kit sharing feature as of version 1.0.7-Alpha allowing players to share their personalized kits with other players

# Also has Kit Claim Options
can enable this setting in /bk

---

# Commands

## /k or /kit
Opens the Kits GUI where players can:

- Create and edit their own custom kits
- Access their personal kit ender chest
- View and use preset kits created by operators

Inside the kit editor GUI, several helpful buttons appear at the bottom to make setup simple, even for players with little experience.

---

# GUI Buttons

## Chest - Kitroom
Opens the Kit Room, allowing players to take items and place them into their personal kits.

## Ender Chest - Echest
Opens a special GUI where players can store items in a kit-specific ender chest.

## Hopper - Import from Inventory
Imports all items and armor directly from the player’s inventory into the kit layout, keeping everything in the exact same slots for accurate loadouts.

## Name Tag - Change Kit Name
Allows players to rename their kit by typing the new name in chat.

---

# Quick Load Commands

## /k1 - /k9
Instantly loads the selected saved kit.

---

# Operator Features

## Kit Room Editing
When an operator enters the Kit Room, an additional Barrier Block button appears in the GUI.

- Shift-clicking this button saves all changes made to the Kit Room.
- Any items added or removed will update globally for all players.

---

## Preset Kits
Operators can create preset kits by:

1. Opening `/kit`
2. Clicking the Nether Star
3. Clicking the Green Dye

This opens the preset kit editor with all normal kit options plus extra customization features.

### Preset Name Colors
A new dye selector allows operators to choose different colors for preset kit names.

---

# Support & Bug Reports

If you find any bugs or have questions about the plugin, feel free to join my Discord server and message me or report issues in the bug-report channel.

Discord:
https://discord.gg/FSydJSAwRx
